summaryRead: Native Cerious page-summary cockpit: use the summary as a fast operator read before opening GOOSE and the spread windows. Focus is driven by spread ranking, macro/news context, source quality, and eligible mean-reversion setups.

top.label: Suggested Focus
top.note: Refresh spread ranking, then prioritize the cleanest z-location with macro confirmation.

top.label: Trade Bias
top.note: Volatility contained, but rates and credit remain gating inputs for RTY leadership.

top.label: Macro / News
top.note: GOOSE and headline feeds should confirm before full-size layering.

top.label: Data Quality
top.note: Cerious serves this payload locally from the copied Cerious artifacts.

classification.label: Current Bias
classification.note: Favor trades where breadth, rates, credit, and spread z-score agree.

classification.label: Eligible Spreads
classification.note: Rank by z-score location, liquidity, macro confirmation, and order-flow status.

classification.label: Algorithmic Approach
classification.note: Layer from qualified bands; reduce size when ATR percentile is elevated.

classification.label: Risk-On / Off Strength
classification.note: The old dashboard used rates, volatility, credit, breadth, leadership, volume, and headlines.

eligibleSpreads.label: ES/NQ
eligibleSpreads.approach: Passive first clip, then extension layers only after stabilization.

eligibleSpreads.label: RTY/ES
eligibleSpreads.approach: Require rates/credit confirmation before full-size exposure.

eligibleSpreads.label: YM/ES
eligibleSpreads.approach: Use smaller clip unless Dow leadership and breadth improve.

gooseComplement: Daily Summary is the static operator briefing imported from Cerious. GOOSE remains the active advisory layer that should confirm or reject the plan as market data, headlines, and spread state update.
